raw_consumer_statement:
on XX/XX/XXXX i called citibank to cancel my credit card as i had lost/misplaced it. 

Citibank cancelled it and confirmed that no further charges would go through on that card. 
I called again the next day to make sure that the card could not be used at all by anyone. once again they assured me that the card could not be used and confirmed that there were NO PENDING CHARGES. 

On XXXX XXXX a charge of {$1500.00} appeared on my statement from a vendor that had the number of that cancelled card. 

when i called Citibank to ask how this could have happened they told me that the card had been cancelled but they had, WITHOUT MY KNOWLEDGE OR CONSENT, sent my NEW card number to all vendors that had recurring debits set up on my account. 
They said now i would have to dispute the charge with the vendor that charged me. 

I do not want to dispute the charge with the vendor. i want Citibank to refund my {$1500.00} as my card should not have been able to be debited and it is Citibanks fault that they did not completly cancel the card and then shared my new card details without my knowledge or consent. 

Citibank is refusing to refund me and is now denying that they sent the card details to anyone even after they admitted that they did.
